diagrams.title: Computer System Components Model
diagrams.description: Shows the four main components of a computer system: Hardware at bottom (foundation), Operating System above hardware, Application Programs above OS, and Users at top
diagrams.purpose: Understanding system hierarchy and resource management flow

diagrams.title: Process State Transition Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the five states of a process and transitions between them
elements: READY - waiting in queue for CPU
WAITING - waiting for I/O or event
diagrams.purpose: Understanding process lifecycle and scheduling decisions

diagrams.title: Kernel Mode vs User Mode
diagrams.description: Shows the separation between privileged kernel mode and restricted user mode with system call interface
diagrams.purpose: Understanding protection mechanisms and privilege levels

diagrams.title: Boot Process Sequence
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step boot process from power-on to user login
diagrams.purpose: Understanding system startup and initialization sequence
